Thomas Hayford curriculum vitae

Founder of Iderwell and business growth partner focused on relationship quality, merchant growth, and execution discipline.

CV Highlights

Relationship Management

Promotion path at Hubtel

Retailer Relationship Executive (2023-2025) to Relationship Manager (March 2025).

Business Results

Reduction in cancellations

Cut retailer cancellations from 20% to 8% through proactive support and readiness checks.

Education and Learning

UCC foundation plus certifications

General Arts at St. John's School - Sekondi (2009-2013), then B.A. Social Science at UCC with continued credentials in software, mobile, and GIS.
